subject: 'Within the Next 20 Years, Half of All Jobs Will Be Taken Over by Machines'
body:
Must-Reads for Jeffrey
==========================================

Mark Zuckerberg and Priscilla Chan make $75M donation to San Francisco...

Mark Zuckerberg and his wife Priscilla Chan are getting a San Francisco hospital named after them.

https://www.linkedin.com/e/v2?e=4b87kv-i5yxef2h-35&t=plh&midToken=AQGEPsgwx2IJSA&ek=b2_content_ecosystem_digest&li=155&m=recommended_articles&urlhash=47bf&url=http%3A%2F%2Fmashable%2Ecom%2F2015%2F02%2F08%2Fmark-zuckerberg-priscilla-chan-san-francisco-general-hospital-donation%2F

------------------------

Intel CFO: We're so far ahead that Apple has no choice but to work with us..

Apple would have to sacrifice performance if it ditched Intel.

https://www.linkedin.com/e/v2?e=4b87kv-i5yxef2h-35&t=plh&midToken=AQGEPsgwx2IJSA&ek=b2_content_ecosystem_digest&li=162&m=recommended_articles&urlhash=Ljws&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ebusinessinsider%2Ecom%2Fintel-and-apple-relationship-2015-2

------------------------

10 Toxic Words you Must not Say in a Job Interview

There’s plenty advice out there to rehearse what you’re going to say in a job interview: research questions the...

https://www.linkedin.com/e/v2?e=4b87kv-i5yxef2h-35&t=plh&midToken=AQGEPsgwx2IJSA&ek=b2_content_ecosystem_digest&li=169&m=recommended_articles&urlhash=soYp&url=http%3A%2F%2F10-toxic-words-you-must-say-job-interview-bernard-marr

------------------------

One photo shows the biggest weakness with the iPhone 6's camera (AAPL)

The iPhone's camera is excellent — but there's one area where it can never measure up to a DSLR.

https://www.linkedin.com/e/v2?e=4b87kv-i5yxef2h-35&t=plh&midToken=AQGEPsgwx2IJSA&ek=b2_content_ecosystem_digest&li=176&m=recommended_articles&urlhash=SBbA&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ebusinessinsider%2Ecom%2Fiphone-6-camera-vs-dslr-2015-2

------------------------

How Starbucks Is About to Change Forever

The outspoken Starbucks CEO tells TIME about his plans to transform his business

https://www.linkedin.com/e/v2?e=4b87kv-i5yxef2h-35&t=plh&midToken=AQGEPsgwx2IJSA&ek=b2_content_ecosystem_digest&li=183&m=recommended_articles&urlhash=lOwt&url=http%3A%2F%2Ftime%2Ecom%2F3696580%2Fhoward-schultz-starbucks-america%2F

------------------------

Google executives explain why the MBA approach to building things is...

Google's hiring chief says he doesn't give much credit to college degrees in the hiring process. So it should come as no surprise...

https://www.linkedin.com/e/v2?e=4b87kv-i5yxef2h-35&t=plh&midToken=AQGEPsgwx2IJSA&ek=b2_content_ecosystem_digest&li=190&m=recommended_articles&urlhash=DQqR&url=http%3A%2F%2Fventurebeat%2Ecom%2F2015%2F02%2F06%2Fgoogle-executives-explain-why-the-mba-approach-to-building-things-is-stupid%2F

------------------------

The Oil Price is down…is it really time to beat up on our suppliers ?

There is a long standing belief held by many executives and staff in Oil Companies that Oilfield Services Companies make too much...

https://www.linkedin.com/e/v2?e=4b87kv-i5yxef2h-35&t=plh&midToken=AQGEPsgwx2IJSA&ek=b2_content_ecosystem_digest&li=197&m=recommended_articles&urlhash=ZWOu&url=http%3A%2F%2Foil-price-downis-really-time-beat-up-our-suppliers-warren-levy
